requirement_topic.zh: 连接器兼容性：GB/T 20234 与 IEC 62196
requirement_topic.zht: 連接器相容性：GB/T 20234 與 IEC 62196

summary.en: Nigeria does not have a verified official universal public EV connector mandate in the sources reviewed, so connector requirements should be taken from the SONCAP route, applicable NIS or approved IEC equivalent, project specification, vehicle fleet, and network operator requirements. Where IEC connectors are specified, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and IEC 62196-3 / CCS-type DC configurations may require hardware changes from a China GB/T product.
summary.zh: 已审阅的官方来源未核实尼日利亚存在统一的公共充电接口强制规则，因此连接器要求应来自SONCAP路径、适用NIS或认可IEC等效标准、项目规范、车辆车队和网络运营方要求。如指定IEC连接器，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和IEC 62196-3/CCS类直流构型可能要求中国GB/T产品进行硬件变更。
summary.zht: 已審閱的官方來源未核實奈及利亞存在統一的公共充電介面強制規則，因此連接器要求應來自SONCAP路徑、適用NIS或認可IEC等效標準、項目規範、車輛車隊和網路營運方要求。如指定IEC連接器，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和IEC 62196-3/CCS類直流構型可能要求中國GB/T產品進行硬體變更。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196 series where specified or accepted
Applicable NIS or approved equivalent standard
Project, fleet, and charging-network connector specification

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 20234 for EV conductive-charging connection devices. GB/T 20234 connector geometry, locking, signaling, and communication assumptions should not be treated as drop-in IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 20234作为电动汽车传导充电连接装置标准。GB/T 20234的连接器几何、锁止、信号和通信假设不应被视为可直接替代IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 20234作為電動汽車傳導充電連接裝置標準。GB/T 20234的連接器幾何、鎖止、信號和通信假設不應被視為可直接替代IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2證據。

gap.en: Exporters should confirm whether the Nigerian buyer wants GB/T, Type 2, CCS2, CHAdeMO, or another connector ecosystem, then align cable assemblies, sockets, vehicle connectors, pilot / proximity circuits, DC communication, labels, spares, and test reports to that ecosystem.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认尼日利亚买方需要GB/T、Type 2、CCS2、CHAdeMO或其他连接器生态，然后将线缆组件、插座、车辆连接器、导引/接近电路、直流通信、标签、备件和测试报告对齐到该生态。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認奈及利亞買方需要GB/T、Type 2、CCS2、CHAdeMO或其他連接器生態，然後將線纜組件、插座、車輛連接器、導引/接近電路、直流通信、標籤、備件和測試報告對齊到該生態。

mandatory_status.target: Project, fleet, network, SONCAP, or accepted-standard dependent; no verified official blanket connector mandate found
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is a China GB-standard connector baseline and is not automatic IEC 62196 compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector fit is a hardware interoperability question. A GB/T 20234 charger should not be represented as IEC 62196-compatible unless the actual connector set and test evidence prove it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] 连接器适配属于硬件互操作问题。除非实际连接器组合和测试证据能够证明，否则不应将GB/T 20234充电桩表述为兼容IEC 62196。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] 連接器適配屬於硬體互操作問題。除非實際連接器組合和測試證據能夠證明，否則不應將GB/T 20234充電樁表述為相容IEC 62196。
